channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Lincoln Mews next to garages, 10th May
item.description:
Large pile of rubbish fly tipped on Friday night.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Lincoln Mews, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Large - More than a van load (Estates)

item.title: Report number 94004356 you said this was fixed but it definitely isn't, 10th May
item.description:
Lots of weeds growing from pavements along Salisbury Road particularly up from 54 Salisbury Road going towards Balfour road and also on the otherside- all very unsightly. Tree outside 54, Salisbury Road needs pruning at the bottom and at the top. I reported this problem but it has not been resolved as per your email
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Salisbury Road, Southborough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumping on public footpath now, 10th May
item.description:
Fully expect this to be moved onto the green shortly. Currently on public footpath.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Waltham Gardens, Enfield
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Obstruction of Sightlines at Junction of Leigham Court Road & Rockmount Road SE27, 10th May
item.description:
Persistent and dangerous parking issue at the junction of Rockhampton Road and Leigham Court Road SE27. This causes difficulty emerging from or entering Rockmount Road. Currently, a large number of dockless e-bikes are being consistently parked on the double yellow lines directly at the junction. This is significantly obstructing sightlines for motorists and creating a high risk of collisions at a busy intersection. ​This issue appears to be caused by a local resident who seems to be intentionally using their refuse bins to block the designated dockless bike bay. Because the official bay is obstructed, users are abandoned the bikes in the nearest available space, which happens to be the junction’s double yellow lines.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rockhampton Road, West Norwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping outside McDonalds, 10th May
item.description:
There is a shopping trolley and a suitcase full of garbage plus offcuts of wood and pallet outside McDonald’s in Eltham.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Well Hall Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.category: Fly-tip Small - Less than one bag

item.title: Chair Dumped outside 16 Park Hill Road, 10th May
item.description:
Hi - this chair appeared this morning - can the Council take it away? Thank you.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Park Hill Road, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Domestic waste dumped here again! Please can the council collect it and also put up more signs and cameras!, 10th May
item.description:
Large Domestic waste dumped here - please can it be collected ASAp before it attracts more fly tipping.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 10, Darwin Street, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned trailer, 10th May
item.description:
This 'trailer' has been dumped opposite 268 for about one month. It is clearly collapsed as the wheels touch the chasis

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Plumstead Common Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Trees overhanging the road, 10th May
item.description:
On Ollerton Road we have a lot of trees where the shoots at ground level are overhanging the the road. It's really difficult to get children out of the back seats of cars if you're parked next to a tree with sharp shoots jutting out. Also the low hanging branches are getting knocked off by delivery vans and blocking the pavements.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Ollerton Road, Southgate
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumping old furniture, 10th May
item.description:
People in the building have been dumping old furniture and it’s a safety hazard covering the fire safety equipment. I’m tired of reporting this constantly can we please put big signs on the wall exactly on that spot and send letters to residents to warn

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): New North Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping - mattress and bed frame, 10th May
item.description:
Flytipping - mattress and bed frame

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Jocelyn Street, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Problem not fixed, the items still there despite this statement from the team, 10th May
item.description:
This flytipping was reported yesterday. The information that it has been fixed is innacurate as my photos were taken today (Sunday)at around 5.30 pm. All still there. Please remove as well as investigate as to why the case was closed and fixed when it wasn't cleared at all. Regards

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping at Whitworth Street/Trafalgar Road, 10th May
item.description:
Fly tipped remains of a sofa or bed by red phone box at junction of Whitworth Street and Trafalgar road. Near 20 Whitworth Street

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Trafalgar Road, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Cricklewood Broadway, London
